ChangeRequest.name: Fully/ Partial written off credit for AnaCredit
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!--See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab)-->
# Overview
According to AnaCredit reporting Manual part II 3.1.6 End date after which an instrument need not be reported the instrument should be reported till the end of the quarter "if a write-off takes place, then the 12 instrument is reported at least until the end of the quarter, even if the instrument is neither held nor serviced by the observed agent after the write-off" Currently in the LDM we store the information on write off only for the specific reference date. we need to keep track of the information for the following reporting reference date till the end of the quarter
### Contact person
@Silvia.Giacinti
### Business definition
we need a way to store this information in the LDM, maybe creating an ad hoc entities with data related to written off amount that are still to be considered in the quarter
### Legal definition
_\[Legal reference\]_
### Reason for inclusion
The inclusion of this information is relevant for reporting the instrument and for the computation of the AnaCredit threshold
### Additional documentation/links (optional)
_www.ecb.europa.eu/pub/pdf/other/AnaCredit_Manual_Part_II_Datasets_and_data_attributes_201905~cc9f4ded23.en.pdf_
### Before closing checklist
- [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] \[ V\] Other actions
